← REGULATORY HUB

California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA)

Your privacy rights under California law as of Q1 2026.

1. Notice at Collection

We collect the following categories of personal information for the purpose of maintaining your simulation state:

  • Identifiers (Username, Public IP for Socket Sync)
  • Commercial Information (Virtual "Uni" Credit balance)
  • Internet/Network Activity (In-game metrics, high scores)

2. Do Not Sell My Information ACTIVE

Spaceforce Squadron does not sell pilot data to third-party data brokers, advertising networks, or inter-faction espionage units. All information stays within the United Terran Coalition ecosystem.

3. Right to Delete

California residents have the right to request the deletion of their personal information. Initiating a system factory reset within the Settings terminal will purge local state; global state deletion can be requested via the Regulatory Hub.

4. Non-Discrimination

The Coalition will not deny mission deployment, increase ship component prices, or provide a lower quality of simulation to pilots who exercise their CCPA rights.

COMPLIANCE_HASH: CCPA-884-CAL-2026
VERIFIED_BY: ATLANTIC_FEDERATION_PRIVACY_BOARD
